title: Senior Developer (Generative AI / Machine Learning / Data)
description:
Deegit Asia Pte Ltd is seeking a highly skilled Senior Generative AI Developer with expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Data Engineering. The ideal candidate will bring 6+ years of professional experience across software development, AI/ML model engineering, and deployment of Generative AI solutions in enterprise environments.


The individual will play a key role in designing, implementing, and scaling AI-powered solutions using advanced ML and Generative AI models (including LLMs, diffusion models, and multimodal architectures). This role requires not just technical depth, but also the ability to collaborate with stakeholders, understand business needs, and deliver AI applications that create measurable business impact.


Qualifications & Experience

Education

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Machine Learning, or a related discipline.

Required Skills & Experience

  • 6+years of hands-on experience in software development, AI/ML engineering, or data-driven solution development.
  • Strong programming skills in Python (mandatory), with additional experience in Java, Scala, or C++ as a plus.
  • Proven expertise in ML/AI frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, Keras.
  • Hands-on experience with Generative AI models (LLMs, GANs, VAEs, Diffusion Models, Transformers).
  • Experience with cloud-based ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, Azure ML, GCP Vertex AI).
  • Strong knowledge of deep learning architectures, natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, and reinforcement learning.
  • Experience with data pipelines, ETL processes, and model deployment in production.
  • Proficiency with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).

Preferred Skills (Good to Have)

  • Knowledge of cybersecurity practices in AI systems.
  • Familiarity with data governance, model explainability, and responsible AI frameworks.
  • Experience in banking, financial services, telecom, or healthcare industries.
  • Exposure to Agile development methodologies.

postedCompany.description:
We are a IT Services, IT Consulting, and Managed Services provider that helps companies improve their operational efficiency and decision-making capabilities utilizing technology.


With our passion, our people, and our genuine desire to achieve operational improvements, we want to see our clients accomplish their performance objectives.


As an solution development partner with years of experience, we bring expert knowledge to every one of our engagements.
postedCompany.name: DEEGIT ASIA PTE. LTD.
